introSection: Balagos - Flying Flame is a Vekoma steel roller coaster located at Avonturenpark Hellendoorn in Hellendoorn, Overijssel, Netherlands. It was the second Vekoma roller coaster installed in the Netherlands when it opened. From 1990 to 2020, the ride was once named Tornado.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Orange track and black supports. The ride used to feature yellow track and green supports.

sections.title: 2021 Renovation
sections.content:
On September 17, 2020, Hellendoorn revealed on their blog that Tornado would receive a makeover in 2021, including new lap bar trains, and a new name. This name was chosen from fan suggestions on Facebook. The new name would eventually be "Balagos - Flying Flame".

A new lighter train was added to the ride in 2025 to reduce wear on the track.

fullText:
Balagos - Flying Flame is a Vekoma steel roller coaster located at Avonturenpark Hellendoorn in Hellendoorn, Overijssel, Netherlands. It was the second Vekoma roller coaster installed in the Netherlands when it opened. From 1990 to 2020, the ride was once named Tornado.



Orange track and black supports. The ride used to feature yellow track and green supports.



On September 17, 2020, Hellendoorn revealed on their blog that Tornado would receive a makeover in 2021, including new lap bar trains, and a new name. This name was chosen from fan suggestions on Facebook. The new name would eventually be "Balagos - Flying Flame".

A new lighter train was added to the ride in 2025 to reduce wear on the track.
